---
title: "Funding"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Funding}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
---

```{r SSI, echo = FALSE, fig.align = "left", out.width = "60%"}
knitr::include_graphics(
  devtools::package_file(
    "vignettes/articles/article_data/funding-SSI.svg"
  )
)
```

This project is in general funded by [Statens Serum Institut]("https://www.ssi.dk").


```{r EU, echo = FALSE, fig.align = "left", out.width = "75%"}
knitr::include_graphics(
  devtools::package_file(
    "vignettes/articles/article_data/funding-EU-co-founded.png"
  )
)
```

Specific parts of this project co-funded by the European Union

* The modelling of spatially structured populations is funded via the [PAIR project](https://doi.org/10.3030/101133191)

* The modelling of waning immunity is funded via the [DURABLE project](https://durableproject.org)
